title: Orthodontic bracket for primary teeth
abstract: An orthodontic bracket (10) for receiving an arch wire (24) of orthodontic patients having both primary teeth (54) and permanent teeth (58), the orthodontic bracket (10) including a pad (12) sized to fit on one of the primary teeth (54), the pad (12) extending a first distance (13) generally in a longitudinal direction (14) and a second distance (15) generally in a lateral direction (16), the first distance (13) being greater than the second distance (15). An eyelet (18) can extend from the pad (12), the eyelet (18) including an aperture (20) defined through the eyelet (18), the aperture (20) having a central axis (22) oriented transverse to the lateral direction (16). The aperture (20) can slidingly receive the arch wire (24). A method including bonding the pad (12) of the orthodontic bracket (10) to one of the primary teeth (54) of the patient.
